name: recoil_app_attract_fmv_on_update_should_quit
description: RecoilApp_AttractFmvState::OnUpdateShouldQuit updates the embedded ATTRACT FMV script, switches to the main-menu prep state when the script is finished, and returns 0.
known_limits: The caller smoke verifies the finished-script branch by using an empty embedded FMV script, which makes UpdateAtTime return 0 and exercises the main-menu-prep QueueSwitchCurrentState side effect.
VC5SP3 compile-only target coverage exists through recoil_app_create_main_wnd; Binary Ninja byte comparison remains pending for the RecoilApp FMV state cluster.
